summary: Formally verified the NU.gg-style green top-nav dashboard layout (TESTS 1, 2, 3 & 5). All required data-testid selectors resolve correctly. Classic layout is preserved when flag is OFF. TEST 4 (read-receipts flip) was not re-verified — it is a known pre-existing backend bug from iteration_14 (msg-sent never flips to msg-read due to the ?since= filter on GET /api/messages/thread/{other_id}). No new bugs found in the green layout implementation.

TEST_1_green_top_nav.header_class: bg-[#0d2b12] sticky top-0 z-20 shadow-lg shadow-emerald-900/40 border-b border-emerald-500/20

nav-messages.note: MessagesView rendered (verified via active state and DOM change)

TEST_3_classic_layout_when_flag_off.header_class: bg-[#2563eb] sticky top-0 z-20 shadow-lg shadow-[#2563eb]/20

TEST_5_admin_toggle_round_trip.status: PASS (via API — the same endpoint /api/admin/ui-config that the Settings toggle wraps)
TEST_5_admin_toggle_round_trip.final_state: use_new_home_layout=true (ON, as instructed to leave in last-test state)

TEST_4_read_receipts.reason: Green-layout scope only. Pre-existing bug from iteration_14 (see backend_issues.critical there): the sender-side msg-sent icon does NOT flip to msg-read because backend GET /api/messages/thread/{other_id}?since=<ts> uses {created_at: {$gt: since}} and never returns read-state mutations on previously delivered messages. Fix pending on main agent.

action_items: (Carry-over from iteration_14, NOT part of green-layout scope) Fix backend GET /api/messages/thread/{other_id}?since=<ts> so the sender's poller can also pick up read-state updates on previously sent messages — e.g. $or: [{created_at: {$gt: since}}, {from_id: user.id, read_at: {$gt: since}}].
critical_code_review_comments: Green layout implementation in ClientDashboard.jsx is clean: `useNewLayout` toggles between the green top-nav shell (no <aside>) and the classic sidebar+blue-header shell. All 7 nav tabs share a single `map` config with data-testid + emerald underline via `span.bg-emerald-400` — good DRY.

ClientDashboard.jsx is now ~1700 lines (many views inline). Consider splitting NewHomeView / FundsView / BuyView / MessagesView etc. into separate files under /pages/client/ for maintainability. Not blocking.
seed_data_creation: None. (Note: brute-force lockout is very aggressive on the login endpoint — 3–4 UI captcha attempts triggered lockout; had to switch to /api/auth/captcha + /api/auth/login and inject bs_user_token into localStorage. Not a bug per-se, just worth flagging for future testing agents.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Green top-nav (NU.gg-style) layout is FULLY WORKING. Selectors: [data-testid=top-nav], nav-home, nav-buy, nav-messages, nav-tickets, nav-funds, nav-redeem, nav-withdraw, topbar-balance, new-home-layout. Classic layout has [data-testid=dashboard-sidebar]. Toggle: POST /api/admin/ui-config with {use_new_home_layout:bool} + header X-Admin-Token (get via POST /api/admin/login-secret {secret:'haha123'}). Final flag state: ON. Only remaining known bug: read-receipt flip (iteration_14).  IMPORTANT for future test agents: the login captcha input uses `[data-testid="login-captcha"]` on the WRAPPER <div>, not the input — the actual answer input is the non-readonly <input> inside. Also, brute-force lockout kicks in after very few failed UI attempts; prefer POST /api/auth/login with a fresh /api/auth/captcha and set localStorage keys `bs_user_token` (JWT string) + `bs_user` (user JSON) to bypass UI login.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no new bugs found. Layout, colors, grid, buttons, admin toggle & flag propagation all confirmed matching the spec (green #0d2b12 header, emerald BUY, orange DEPOSIT, 3-col grid, 7 nav tabs, no sidebar in new layout).
